children.label: A
children.text: all students in pursuing and completing programs of study aligned to high-skill, high-wage occupations; and

children.label: B
children.text: any special population or specific subgroup of students identified in in pursuing and completing programs of study aligned to high-skill, high-wage occupations in fields in which such special population or subgroup is underrepresented; andsection 6311(h)(1)(C)(ii) of this title
any challenges associated with replication of such strategies, components, policies, and practices.
teachers, faculty, specialized instructional support personnel, and paraprofessionals, including those with expertise in preparing career and technical education students for non-traditional fields;

children.heading: Submission
children.label: c Submission
children.text: Upon completion, the Comptroller General of the United States shall submit the study conducted under subsection (a) to the Committee on Education and the Workforce of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions of the Senate.
